options.content:
# Dependency Health Monitor
Automatic monitoring of **27 open-source dependencies** across license risk, security vulnerabilities, maintenance activity, and sustainability.

panels.description: Total projects currently being monitored
panels.title: Projects Monitored

panels.description: Average health score across all monitored projects
panels.title: Avg Health Score

panels.description: Average sustainability score across all monitored projects
panels.title: Avg Sustainability

panels.description: Total critical + high vulnerabilities across all projects
panels.title: Critical/High CVEs

panels.description: Projects with high or unknown license risk
panels.title: License Risks (High+)

panels.description: When metrics were last collected successfully
panels.title: Last Collection

panels.description: Comprehensive view of all projects. Click column headers to sort.
panels.title: All Projects Overview

panels.description:
License risk auto-detected from SPDX identifier.

- **HIGH (red)**: SSPL, BSL, Elastic - not OSI approved
- **MEDIUM (orange)**: AGPL, GPL - copyleft
- **LOW (green)**: MIT, Apache, BSD - permissive
- **UNKNOWN (purple)**: Not detected
panels.title: License Risk

panels.description:
Detects when a project's license changes.

Red = License changed since monitoring started (investigate immediately!)
panels.title: License Changes

panels.description: Projects archived on GitHub = no longer maintained. Find alternatives!
panels.title: Archived Projects

panels.description:
**Sustainability Score** (0-100)

Long-term viability:
- License risk (35%)
- Bus factor (25%)
- Recent activity (20%)
- Funding (10%)
- Popularity (10%)
panels.title: Sustainability Score (lower = at risk)

panels.description:
**Health Score** (0-100)

Current security & maintenance:
- OpenSSF Score (40%)
- Vulnerabilities (30%)
- Archived status (20%)
- Release freshness (10%)
panels.title: Health Score (lower = security concerns)

panels.description:
**OpenSSF Scorecard** (0-10)

Security best practices: code review, branch protection, CI/CD, dependency updates, signed releases, SAST.

Higher = better.
panels.title: Security Score (OpenSSF)

panels.description: Critical and high severity CVEs from OSV.dev.
panels.title: Vulnerabilities (Critical/High)

panels.description:
How many major/minor versions behind the latest release.

- 0: Up to date
- 1-2: Minor updates available
- 3+: Significantly behind
panels.title: Versions Behind

panels.description: Version configured in your projects.yml for CVE detection.
panels.title: Current Versions

panels.description: Latest release from GitHub. Compare with current to see available updates.
panels.title: Latest Versions

panels.description:
How long since the last commit.

- Green (<30d): Active
- Yellow (30-90d): Slowing
- Orange (90-180d): Stalling
- Red (>180d): Likely abandoned
panels.title: Days Since Last Commit

panels.description:
Days since last release/tag on GitHub.

High values may indicate the project ships infrequently or is winding down.
panels.title: Days Since Last Release

panels.description:
Number of contributors (bus factor).

- 1-3: High risk (single point of failure)
- 4-10: Medium risk
- 10+: Distributed maintainership
panels.title: Contributors (Bus Factor)

panels.description: GitHub stars - community interest and awareness.
panels.title: GitHub Stars (Top 15)

panels.description: GitHub forks - developer interest and fork readiness if project is abandoned.
panels.title: GitHub Forks (Top 15)

panels.description:
Dependents from Libraries.io - how many projects rely on this package.
More dependents = more ecosystem importance.
panels.title: Dependents (Top 15)

panels.description: Libraries.io SourceRank - composite score of project quality, community, and maintenance.
panels.title: SourceRank (Libraries.io)

panels.description: Projects with funding (GitHub Sponsors, Open Collective, etc.) are more likely to be maintained long-term.
panels.title: Funding Status

panels.description: Track sustainability score changes over time. Drops may indicate license changes, maintainer departure, or reduced activity.
panels.title: Sustainability Score Over Time

panels.description: Track health score changes over time. Drops may indicate new vulnerabilities, security score decreases, or archival.
panels.title: Health Score Over Time

panels.description: Collection errors by project and API source
panels.title: Collection Errors (Top 10)

panels.description: Total errors, errors rate over time, and error breakdown by source API.
panels.title: Errors Over Time (by source)
